use_cases: Creating animated headlines with a scramble-to-reveal effect for hero sections
Adding visual interest to status messages with character randomization animations
Building scroll-triggered text reveals for landing pages
Enhancing portfolio or portfolio-style showcases with glitch-like text effects
Creating loading states with animated placeholder text
ai_summary: A lightweight React text scrambling component that animates characters through random sets before resolving to the final text. Supports custom duration, speed, and character sets with Framer Motion integration. Commonly used for scroll-triggered text reveal effects in hero sections and landing pages, creating a cyberpunk-like typing/glitch aesthetic.
